title: End-to-end user journey through feedback submission, general app settings (licenses and privacy policy), and notifications configuration
scenario: User navigates feedback, settings, and notification toggles from the "No devices connected" page in Poly Studio Mobile app without a paired device
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Observe the Home screen displaying "No devices connected" page.
3. Tap the Menu icon (hamburger menu) in the top-left corner of the Home screen.
4. From the menu, tap "Send Feedback" to submit feedback via the main menu.
5. Return to the Home screen ("No devices connected" page).
6. Tap the Menu icon again to open the navigation drawer.
8. In the Settings screen, tap "Licenses" to view license information.
10. Tap "Privacy Policy" to view the privacy policy.
12. Tap "Notifications" to open the Notifications configuration screen.
13. Locate the "Notifications" toggle and verify its state.
14. Locate the "Device Charging" toggle and verify its state.
15. Locate the "Device Disconnected" toggle and verify its state.
16. Locate the "Low Battery" toggle and verify its state.
17. Locate the "Device Software Update" toggle and verify its state.
expected: All menu items and settings screens are accessible and functional. The user can navigate to Send Feedback, view Licenses and Privacy Policy, and see all notification toggles (Notifications, Device Charging, Device Disconnected, Low Battery, Device Software Update) in the Notifications settings screen. Each toggle can be enabled or disabled independently.
